hooks.name: litestar-session-start
hooks.command: r="${ANTIGRAVITY_PLUGIN_ROOT:-${PLUGIN_ROOT:-${AGY_PLUGIN_ROOT:-}}}"; h="${HOME:-}"; if [ -n "$r" ] && [ ! -f "${r%/}/hooks/session-start.sh" ]; then r=""; fi; if [ -z "$r" ] && [ -n "$h" ] && [ -f "${h%/}/.gemini/config/plugins/litestar/hooks/session-start.sh" ]; then r="${h%/}/.gemini/config/plugins/litestar"; fi; if [ -z "$r" ] && [ -f ./hooks/session-start.sh ]; then r="."; fi; [ -n "$r" ] || exit 0; ANTIGRAVITY_PLUGIN_ROOT="${r%/}" PLUGIN_ROOT="${r%/}" bash "${r%/}/hooks/session-start.sh"
hooks.description: Inject project-aware Litestar skill reminders into the Antigravity CLI session context.
